'''鈭歠-h-s''' ('''kafahas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stalemate|stalemate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-h-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stalemate|stalemate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-h-s
|-
! Lemma
| kafahas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifahas|thifahas]] || [[word:jifahas|jifahas]] || [[word:shifahas|shifahas]] || [[word:kifahas|kifahas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufahas|thuthufahas]] || [[word:jujufahas|jujufahas]] || [[word:shushufahas|shushufahas]] || [[word:kukufahas|kukufahas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufahas|thufahas]] || [[word:jufahas|jufahas]] || [[word:shufahas|shufahas]] || [[word:kufahas|kufahas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufahas|thufahas]] || [[word:jufahas|jufahas]] || [[word:shufahas|shufahas]] || [[word:kufahas|kufahas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefahas|thefahas]] || [[word:jefahas|jefahas]] || [[word:shefahas|shefahas]] || [[word:kefahas|kefahas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofahas|thothofahas]] || [[word:jojofahas|jojofahas]] || [[word:shoshofahas|shoshofahas]] || [[word:kokofahas|kokofahas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofahas|thofahas]] || [[word:jofahas|jofahas]] || [[word:shofahas|shofahas]] || [[word:kofahas|kofahas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofahas|thofahas]] || [[word:jofahas|jofahas]] || [[word:shofahas|shofahas]] || [[word:kofahas|kofahas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fahas|fahas]] || [[word:fahas|fahas]] || [[word:fahas|fahas]] || [[word:fahas|fahas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fahas|fahas]] || [[word:fahas|fahas]] || [[word:fahas|fahas]] || [[word:fahas|fahas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fahas|fahas]] || [[word:fahas|fahas]] || [[word:fahas|fahas]] || [[word:fahas|fahas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fahas|fahas]] || [[word:fahas|fahas]] || [[word:fahas|fahas]] || [[word:fahas|fahas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fahas|th忙fahas]] || [[word:j忙fahas|j忙fahas]] || [[word:sh忙fahas|sh忙fahas]] || [[word:k忙fahas|k忙fahas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafahas|thathafahas]] || [[word:jajafahas|jajafahas]] || [[word:shashafahas|shashafahas]] || [[word:kakafahas|kakafahas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafahas|thafahas]] || [[word:jafahas|jafahas]] || [[word:shafahas|shafahas]] || [[word:kafahas|kafahas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafahas|thafahas]] || [[word:jafahas|jafahas]] || [[word:shafahas|shafahas]] || [[word:kafahas|kafahas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafahas|shafahas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafahas|goshafahas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafahas|gokishafahas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafahasn眉|shafahasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafahasnkn眉|goshafahasnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafahasn眉|gokishafahasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafahassh毛|shafahassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafahasnksh毛|goshafahasnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafahassh毛|gokishafahassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafahasro|shafahasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafahasnkro|goshafahasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafahasro|gokishafahasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafahasmu|shafahasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafahasnkmu|goshafahasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafahasmu|gokishafahasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafahassher|shafahassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafahasnksher|goshafahasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafahassher|gokishafahassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafahasng|shafahasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafahasnkng|goshafahasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafahasng|gokishafahasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafahasya|shafahasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafahasnkya|goshafahasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafahasya|gokishafahasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafahasyam|shafahasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafahasnkyam|goshafahasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafahasyam|gokishafahasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafahasn眉sh毛|shafahasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafahasnkn眉sh毛|goshafahasnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafahasn眉sh毛|gokishafahasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafahasn眉ro|shafahasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafahasnkn眉ro|goshafahasnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafahasn眉ro|gokishafahasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafahasn眉mu|shafahasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafahasnkn眉mu|goshafahasnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafahasn眉mu|gokishafahasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafahassh毛n眉|shafahassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafahasnksh毛n眉|goshafahasnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafahassh毛n眉|gokishafahassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafahassh毛ro|shafahassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafahasnksh毛ro|goshafahasnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafahassh毛ro|gokishafahassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafahassh毛mu|shafahassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafahasnksh毛mu|goshafahasnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafahassh毛mu|gokishafahassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafahasron眉|shafahasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafahasnkron眉|goshafahasnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafahasron眉|gokishafahasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafahasrosh毛|shafahasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafahasnkrosh毛|goshafahasnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafahasrosh毛|gokishafahasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafahasromu|shafahasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafahasnkromu|goshafahasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafahasromu|gokishafahasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafahasmun眉|shafahasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafahasnkmun眉|goshafahasnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafahasmun眉|gokishafahasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafahasmush毛|shafahasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafahasnkmush毛|goshafahasnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafahasmush毛|gokishafahasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafahasmuro|shafahasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafahasnkmuro|goshafahasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafahasmuro|gokishafahasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
